MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Brenda Hutcherson.
Attorney Paul Arshawsky appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Stacie Gaines is present.
Attorney Madeline Howard representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Steve Collier, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JUL-02-2012 is vacated.
